title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva sets Tarakasura's sons and Asura Guru free from captivity, cautioning them about their inevitable downfall in their next confrontation. Will Tarakasura's sons heed this warning seriously?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya transforms into Sadananda with six faces as his mothers attempt to feed him. Meanwhile, Tarakasura's sons conduct a dark ritual, summoning Goddess Parvati.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Chakor, a young girl, who was kept as a collateral for money before she was born grows up into a free-spirited athlete. She raises her voice against the system of bonded labour in her village.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Chakor, a young girl, who was kept as a collateral for money before she was born grows up into a free-spirited athlete. She raises her voice against the system of bonded labour in her village.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Aabha looks into the pencil case and finds a gun inside. She somehow manages to use it despite being afraid.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Kasturi learns that Imli is sick and needs medicine. Meanwhile, Bhuvan is delighted when Chakor dresses up for a school event.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Aabha learns that the jail authorities have freed Manohar, Pasha and Kalashi. Soon, Ishwar attempts to uncover who agreed to this release.

title: Chakori
subTitle: Bhuvan decides to believe Prabhakar's words, while Aditya and Vivaan come to see Chakor at school and take her.

title: Chakori
subTitle: The security guards try to prevent Bhuvan from entering the school and meeting with Chakor. Arjun decides to bring Bhuvan to the gate.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Niranjan approaches Chandu Bargi and informs him about Janaki wanting to move out. When Chandu refuses to help them financially, Niranjan requests him to convince Janaki to stay back in her house.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: After Rashmi's intervention, Janaki decides to stay at her stepfather's house instead of moving out. Chandu is infuriated with this development because it robs him of the opportunity to take revenge on CSP through his daughter's suffering.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Chandu Bargi is infuriated with the police for questioning him regarding the alleged kidnapping of Anand. Not content with insulting the inspector, Chandu goes to the Chief Minister with the intention of shutting down the investigation.

title: Raja loves Radhe
subTitle: Raja, a radio lover, falls in love with Radhe, a radio jockey. Soon, their relationship blossoms into something that completely transforms Raja's life.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal wants another child, but Lalithamba refuses. However, the couple's situation changes when Vittal finds a baby on the street.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalli is fortunate to find a rare ring among antique objects available for purchase. Later, a saint warns her against wearing the ring, as it brings bad luck.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal treats a skincare enthusiast with an outdated medication. Later, treatment causes rapid facial side effects, forming dark patches on the patient's skin.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vishalu becomes jealous of Vittal and Lalli's romance, leading to a heated argument with Ranganath. Later, Ranganath seeks the assistance of Vittal and Lalli to create a plan to unite the couple.

subTitle: Gangadhar’s minister advise him to procure a heir in order to secure the throne. Meanwhile, Manu attacks the girl whom Nana is attracted to, assuming she is a British spy.

subTitle: While Varun Vaibhav plans to fly back to his country soon, Chandu requests him to stay for a while and assures of closing the case shortly. Meanwhile, Janaki meets Sanjana and collects few evidences related to her husband's death.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: When Janaki runs into Madhukar at his office, he tries to know more about her investigation into the Varun Vaibhav case.

subTitle: The family is shocked when they hear that Lalithamba is dead. Soon, they struggle to cope with the news of her loss.

subTitle: A stranger makes an unusual request of Lalli, but he refuses to comply. However, Vittal accepts the task in an attempt to impress the stranger.

subTitle: Varun Vaibhav shares his anxiety about meeting Janaki when he meets Chandu. Chandu then tells him about Janaki's visit to the Himalayas to gather evidence. Upon noticing a change in his behaviour, Chandu asks Varun about the problem.

subTitle: Tarakasura's sons undertake a strenuous worship of Goddess Parvati. When she doesn't respond, Lord Shiv and the Goddess engage in a heated argument.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki's request for a monthly allowance has put Niranjan in a tight spot. With no job to rely on, Niranjan asks for a favour from his brother. Will Niranjan be able to meet Janaki's needs?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Upon learning that Janaki is feeling alienated from the family, Chanchala confronts Chandu about his indifference towards Janaki. When Chandu realises that his behaviour is affecting the equilibrium of the family, he decides to set things right.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Chandu senses a storm brewing when Rashmi asks for a way to finance the newlyweds' livelihood. He refuses to provide help as Janaki is not his daughter. However, he changes tact upon realising that Janaki is eavesdropping.

title: Ondu Motteya Kathe
subTitle: Ondu Motteya Kathe is a 2017 Kannada language romantic comedy film written and directed by debutant Raj B. Shetty who also appears in the lead role, along with Usha Bhandary, Shailashree,Prakash Tuminadu, Amrutha Naik, Shreya Anchan, Vj Vineeth.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Ranganath accidentally locked his jaw while teasing his wife and is unable to free it himself. Later, Vittal assures Ranganath of a simple surgery to resolve the issue.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalli hit a street vendor with her car, causing a severe injury and affecting his business. Later, the vendor arrives at Lalli's residence and requests that a family member work in his place to compensate for his earnings.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalithamba is delighted when she finds a magical ring. However, a wise sage suddenly warns her against keeping it.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Swamiji advises Lalli to divorce Vittal and remarry him to advance her political career. Later, Vittal signs the divorce document, and Lalli is shocked as Swamiji refuses to remarry her unless she agrees to all his conditions.

subTitle: After Chandu promises to shield him, Varun Vaibhav confesses to his crime and accepts that he is Sanjana's husband. Meanwhile, Meera calls Sanjana and asks her to update Janaki about Varun Vaibhav's plan to flee the country.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Unable to contact Janaki, Sanjana feels helpless and loses all hope of catching Varun Vaibhav. But Janaki arrives on time and learns that Varun Vaibhav has left for the airport with Chandu. Can Janaki stop Varun Vaibhav from fleeing?

subTitle: Kartikeya persists in his determination and summons Goddess Parvati to disclose the identity of his father. Expressing his resentment, he condemns his father for abandoning him throughout the years.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Hurt by her father's comments, Janaki decides to give up all of her joint shares with Chandu and return it back to him. After discussing it with Niranjan, Janaki decides to inform Chandu about her final decision.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Feeling constrained in her own house, Janaki looks desperately for an outlet and considers moving to Washington with Niranjan. Despite Niranjan's protests, she decides to meet the Chief Minister to request a change in Niranjan's posting.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: After many futile attempts, the CM informs Janaki that Niranjan's file is no where to be found. A disturbed Janaki returns home and confronts Niranjan. Guilt-ridden, he tries his best to justify his lies.
